reasoning: Eminem is not currently, nor is he tracking to be, the top Spotify artist of 2025. Based on data from the year leading up to late October 2025, his daily and monthly stream counts are vastly outperformed by artists such as Taylor Swift, The Weeknd, Bad Bunny, and Drake. Taylor Swift is widely recognized as the clear favorite to take the #1 spot, a position she held the previous two years. Additionally, Eminem did not release a new studio album in 2025, and his estimated 7-8 billion streams for the year are not nearly sufficient to compete for the top position, which typically requires upwards of 20-25 billion streams. Due to this insurmountable gap, the probability of him being #1 is effectively zero.
